title: Hafiz
content:
Her passions the shy violet
    From Hafiz never hides;
    Love-longings of the raptured bird
    The bird to him confides.
meaning:
"Hafiz" is a quintessential example of Ralph Waldo Emerson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
